settings.heading: A cleaner chew routine for aggressive chewers.
settings.subheading: For dogs that destroy softer treats quickly, Prime yak chews offer dense, rawhide-free calm-time enrichment with size-up guidance.
settings.estimate_note: Power chewers should size up and use supervised sessions. Use the estimator before checkout.
settings.card_1_text: Breed matters, but chewing style matters more. Gentle, moderate, and power chewers need different size confidence.
settings.card_2_text: Prime chews use yak milk, cow milk, lime juice, and salt. No rawhide or artificial fillers.
settings.card_3_text: Run the estimator once and your My Dog dashboard can remember size, duration, and reorder timing.
